title: Interstellar
summary: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: Event Horizon
summary: A rescue crew investigates a spaceship that disappeared into a black hole and has now returned...with someone or something new on-board.

title: The Martian
summary: An astronaut becomes stranded on Mars and must rely on his ingenuity to survive until he can be rescued.

title: Independence Day
summary: A global catastrophe forces humanity to band together and fight for survival against an alien invasion.
